title: Universal Lime Green High Visibility Mesh Safety Vest Unisex One Size Fits All
description:
A Safety Vest is a necessity on many job sites or other activities like hunting or riding your bike at night. It is important to be visible and this is the ideal product to draw attention to yourself. Constructed from 100% polyester mesh, this item is lightweight and breathable. It's bright lime green color will attract anyone's attention to keep you safe and out of harms way. Made to be worn by any gender and most body sizes, this safety vest is a smart investment if you are involved in any activity where visibility is important. Pick one up today, it might save your life!
